---
title: "Abstracts"
toc: false
---

Abstract submission for the 2nd Peritoneal Summit will open in **spring 2027**. Specific deadlines, submission portal, and the abstract template will be announced here.

## What we will be looking for

The Summit welcomes contributions across the full breadth of peritoneal research and technology, including but not limited to:

- Peritoneal immunity and tissue repair
- Peritoneal carcinomatosis, metastasis, and surgical oncology
- Endometriosis and peritoneal pathology
- Peritoneal dialysis, fibrosis, and mesothelial-to-mesenchymal transition
- Imaging, single-cell, and spatial methods
- Biomaterials, surgical mesh, and adhesion prevention
- Translational and clinical studies

## Format

The 2025 edition included oral presentations selected from submitted abstracts, a flash-talk session, and a poster session. We anticipate a similar format for 2027.

## Awards

Best-poster and best-talk awards will be granted, as they were at the 2025 Summit. Details will follow with the call for abstracts.

<!-- TODO: add: portal URL, deadlines, template download, review committee -->
